transcript: Sweetheart, I'm going to inspect that forest site where my chemical factory would be built in a couple of years. Ethan, take care and be safe. I heard too many spooky stories about that forest. It's all rumors, honey. Don't worry. I would be fine. Should have stayed on the trail. Thank you. Come on, come on! Work! Damn it! Hello? Who's there? This isn't funny. Who, who are you?  No! It's not possible! You shouldn't have come here, Ethon. Stay back! You can't escape. You're already here. You must be punished for your deadly plans against humanity. That day, I survived somehow. I dropped my plan of putting a chemical plant by destroying the jungle. I learned my lesson. To you.
